name: XXE via libxmljs2 noent:true (CVE-2023-23362 family)
pattern_description: XML parser configuration changes from secure-by-default (noent:false, nonet:true, dtdload:false) to entity-expanding (noent:true), enabling XXE. Common regression pattern across Node XML libraries.
notes: The hunk visibly removes three protective flags (`nonet`, `dtdload`, `noent:false`) and replaces them with `noent:true`. exploit_trace is fully recoverable from the diff alone, so high confidence is justified.
